data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the commission configuration of 60% to stylist and 40% to salon. However, the evidence provided does not confirm this specific commission structure; instead, it mentions varying commission rates for stylists (70% for veterans and 50% for juniors) without addressing the required 60%-40% split. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not align with the expected commission configuration.
gaps: No evidence of commission configuration per provider as specified (60% to stylist, 40% to salon).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify commission configuration for each provider
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the commission configuration is set to 60% for stylists and 40% for the salon.
